result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate documentation for a binary PowerShell module

Usage:
  Svrooij.PowerShell.Docs [options]

Options:
  --dll <dll>              The path to the dll to generate documentation for
  --use-xml-docs           Should we try to load the xml docs, (you probably want to enable this).
  --md-output <md-output>  The path where the markdown files will be written to.
  --maml-file <maml-file>  Output location for the maml file (powershell docs format)
  --version                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate documentation for a binary PowerShell module

Usage:
  Svrooij.PowerShell.Docs [options]

Options:
  --dll <dll>              The path to the dll to generate documentation for
  --use-xml-docs           Should we try to load the xml docs, (you probably want to enable this).
  --md-output <md-output>  The path where the markdown files will be written to.
  --maml-file <maml-file>  Output location for the maml file (powershell docs format)
  --version                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information
